jobText:
Senior Backend Engineer - CloudWorks

CloudWorks is hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to build API services for our data platform. Responsibilities include designing REST APIs, maintaining PostgreSQL schemas, deploying Docker containers, and building event-driven workflows with RabbitMQ.

Requirements: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, REST APIs, RabbitMQ, 3+ years backend engineering experience.

Frontend Engineer - PixelForge

PixelForge needs a Frontend Engineer to build user-facing SaaS dashboards. The role focuses on React components, TypeScript, Vite builds, Tailwind CSS styling, accessibility, and integration with REST APIs.

Requirements: React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, HTML, CSS, frontend testing experience.
